Retrieve generic drug names for antihypertensive medications

Source: R/drugs.R
get_antihypertensive_generics.Rd

spec_antihypertensive is a CompositeDrugSpec containing all versioned antihypertensive leaf specs directly (no intermediate composites): acei_v1, acei_v2, arb_v1, arb_v2, alpha_v1, alpha_beta_v1, alpha_beta_v2, cardio_v1, cardio_vasod_v1, int_sym_v1, int_sym_v2, noncardio_v1, ccb_dhp_v1, ccb_dhp_v2, ccb_nondhp_v1, thiazide_v1, thiazide_v2, loop_v1, loop_v2, ksparing_v1, ksparing_v2, aldo_v1, central_v1, central_v2, renin_v1, vasodilators_v1.

Usage

get_antihypertensive_generics(component = NULL)

Arguments

component

Required. Component name. Print spec_antihypertensive to see all available names.

Value

Character vector of GNN strings (upper-case).

See also

spec_antihypertensive

On this page
